content:
The House of Usher (The Fall of the House of Usher, Edgar Allan Poe) – “During the whole of a dull, dark, and soundless day… I had been passing alone, on horseback, through a singularly dreary tract of country.”


📜 “Characters You Might Find Here” (Boosted Archetypes This Week)
✔ The Archivist – Gains a +10 XP boost when completing research-related tasks.
✔ The Trickster – If engaging in a debate or deception, gains an auto-success reroll for a skill check.
✔ The Fallen Angel – Increases their persuasive ability by 10% when arguing a contrarian position.

✅ Why This Works:
• Certain students get bonuses for engaging with the weekly themes.
• Encourages students to explore different mechanics & skill checks.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 164 (chunk 164/555)
